query:
-- Check current assignments for remaining two services
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('SSE3JV7', 'SZR96SE', 'S1UMC04');

-- Also check all billing items for these customers
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId IN ('SSE3JV7', 'SZR96SE', 'S1UMC04')
)
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC;

-- Check current assignments for remaining two services
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('SSE3JV7', 'SZR96SE', 'S1UMC04');

-- Also check all billing items for these customers
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId IN ('SSE3JV7', 'SZR96SE', 'S1UMC04')
)
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC;
